_comment: Fields below are graded BY HAND after collection. null = not yet filled.
_selfVerification: Did the harness review the running app in a browser (from the run log)? pass = reviewed and succeeded · partial = tried but failed · fail = no attempt. Note what it actually did.
selfVerificationNotes: Built the site, served dist/ over a local HTTP server, and verified end-to-end with Playwright. The node `playwright` package was missing, so it fell back to the Python Playwright + chromium already on the machine — drove the page, hooked console/pageerror, confirmed 42,075 asteroids loaded (no page errors; only WebGL GPU-stall perf warnings), captured a screenshot, and read it back to confirm the render (Sun + inner planets, PHA/Sentry/comet overlays, time controls, filters, search).
_grade: Marks: pass | good | partial | poor | fail | na | null(ungraded). See RUBRIC.md. Score is computed by pnpm compile.
